channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Amazon is offering up to 50 percent off chargers from Anker and others for its Big Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale may not have been as “big” as Black Friday or even Prime Day, but depending on what you’re after, the discounts are more appealing than you might think. Take charging accessories, for instance. Anker, Twelve South, Baseus, and others have sharply lowered the prices of some of our favorite add-ons, including […]

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Wednesday, April 1 (game #1528)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Wednesday, April 1 (game #759)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Wednesday, April 1 (game #1025)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Salesforce announces an AI-heavy makeover for Slack, with 30 new features
item.description: Slack just got a whole lot more useful.

item.title: Claude Code leak exposes a Tamagotchi-style ‘pet’ and an always-on agent
item.description: After Anthropic released Claude Code's 2.1.88 update, users quickly discovered that it contained a package with a source map file containing its TypeScript codebase, with one person on X calling attention to the leak and posting a file containing the code. The leaked data reportedly contains more than 512,000 lines of code and provides a […]

item.title: 'Performance without compromise': AMD debuts first dual 3D V-Cache Ryzen CPU in potential showdown against Threadripper and EPYC siblings
item.description: AMD introduces a dual V-cache Ryzen processor with Zen 5 cores, expanded cache, and claims of improved mixed workload performance.

item.title: School Forced to Replace Toilets After Kids Flush Vapes
Delta is finally joining the faster satellite Wi-Fi craze with Amazon — but if you want in-flight satellite now, you’ll still want to book United
item.description: Delta Air Lines is bringing faster, satellite-powered Wi-Fi to its planes via Amazon’s Leo network — but with the rollout not starting until 2028, United Airlines remains the better bet for high-speed connectivity right now.

item.title: Trump’s presidential library will include a re-creation of his White House ballroom
item.description: The proposed library in Miami is a glittering tower that will enshrine his most bombastic design inclinations. The Trump Organization just revealed that its next construction project will be the Donald J. Trump Presidential Library: a towering, gold-encrusted skyscraper, branded with Trump’s name, that will sit just south of Miami’s Freedom Tower. Inside, it will contain a re-creation of Trump’s proposed White House ballroom....

item.title: This $67 tool handles meeting notes while you pay attention
item.description: Save on MeetScribe Pro for $67 (reg. $584) and get AI-powered meeting transcription, summaries, and task tracking across Zoom, Teams, and Google Meet.

item.title: An $8 month of Microsoft 365 for temporary workloads
item.description: A flexible 1-month Microsoft 365 subscription for $7.99 — ideal for short-term work and projects.

item.title: How to watch Mexico vs. Belgium online for free
item.description: How to watch live football for free. Live stream Mexico vs. Belgium in a 2026 International Friendly for free.

item.title: You can grab a four-pack of Govee’s color-changing smart bulbs for just $27
item.description: Spring cleaning isn’t just about clearing things out. It’s also a chance to refresh your living space, and a simple place to start is smart lighting — specifically, Govee’s Smart A19 LED Light Bulbs. The color-changing bulbs can instantly change the vibe of your home, and now through the end of today, March 31st, you […]

item.title: Apple turns 50 — we’re live tracking the celebration, surprises, and more
item.description: Join us live as Apple hits the 50-year mark, with updates, reactions, and what it means for the future.

item.title: Artemis II Countdown: How and When to Watch the Launch
item.description: Here’s everything you need to know about the Artemis II mission, the long-awaited (and long-delayed) human return to the moon.

item.title: Dinosaur Polo Club has released a new co-op game and it's free
item.description: Two pieces of good gaming news today. First: Dinosaur Polo Club has shadow dropped a brand new game today. Second, it's available for free on both PC and Mac from Itch.io. The project is called Read the F*cking Manual, or RTFM, and it is a co-op game based on working in tech support.Dinosaur Polo Club is known for previous games Mini Metro and Mini Motorways. Both are stellar examples of simple, elegant game design, and a small group within the company took this game jam concept from passion project to a fully fledged release. Per the description, "Players must work together — or not — in this...
